calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2020 Off Calendar

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Michael Klein for Defendants.
No other appearances.

NOT ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs MATTHEW COHEN, RANDALL KATZ, PAUL KELLEY, SYNESIS ADVISORS, INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Sustain without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The court notes that although a notice of stay of proceedings was filed on February 7, 2020 as to plaintiff Howard Wong, indicating that he filed a bankruptcy case under Chapter 7 of the U.S. Bankruptcy Code on that date, the automatic stay applies only to actions filed against debtors. (Shah v. Glendale Bank (1996) 44 Cal.App.4th 1371, 1375 ["the automatic stay is inapplicable to superior court actions initiated by the debtor"].)

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Michael Klein for Defendants.
No other appearances.

NOT ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs MATTHEW COHEN, RANDALL KATZ, PAUL KELLEY, SYNESIS ADVISORS, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT: Grant. No opposition filed. The court notes that although a notice of stay of proceedings was filed on February 7, 2020 as to plaintiff Howard Wong, indicating that he filed a bankruptcy case under Chapter 7 of the U.S. Bankruptcy Code on that date, the automatic stay applies only to actions filed against debtors. (Shah v. Glendale Bank (1996) 44 Cal.App.4th 1371, 1375 ["the automatic stay is inapplicable to superior court actions initiated by the debtor"].)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
